reasoning: The PCI DSS control 2.2.2 focuses on ensuring that systems are not publicly accessible unless justified. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to restrict ingress and egress traffic by default, that services are not exposed using NodePort unless necessary, and that ingress traffic is secured with TLS. These checks help ensure that Kubernetes workloads are not inadvertently exposed to the internet, aligning with the control's intent to limit public access.
title: Requirement 2.2.2
